name: Mentha ~ 💚The Ultimate Hangover Cure💤
description:
Nothing can sober you up after a night of drinking faster than waking up to see your half-naked best friend in your bed.

Yeah I made another Mentha bot. I simply couldn't resist. Plus, I wanted to make sure the world saw this art of her because GYATT DAMN it is probably my favorite pic the AI produced other than the one I used for my first Mentha bot (tho I probably would've made her a bit chubbier in the midsection. Just a bit.).

Anyways, enjoy.

QUICK UPDATE: Made it anypov :)

🎨: Art by me using the Novel AI image generator.
creator: MosaicMaelstrom
